name: Wasteland (Future)
description:
"Future Saga" Category Super Class 
enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +10%

name: Infinite Zamasu
description:
Increases damage received by 
Super Class enemies and allies by 30%

name: City (Future) (Rainy)
description:
Increases damage received by 
Extreme Class enemies and allies by 30%

name: City (Future) (Rift in Time)
description:
"Super Bosses" Category enemies' and allies' 
ATK & DEF +10%, plus an additional ATK & DEF +10%

name: Extradimensional Space
description:
Extreme Class enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +10%,

who also belong to the "Exploding Rage" or 
"Movie Bosses" Category; increases damage 
received by Super Class enemies and allies by 10%

name: Illuminated World of Void
description:
Super Class enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +15%, 
plus an additional ATK +15% for characters

Super Class enemies and allies can 
nullify attacks that are guaranteed to hit, 
making it possible to evade these attacks

name: Molten Lava of Natade Village
description:
"Uncontrollable Power" Category 
enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +15%; 
increases damage received by 
Super Class enemies and allies by 15%, 
plus an additional 10% for characters who 
also belong to the "Movie Heroes" Category

name: Inside Majin Buu
description:
"Power Absorption" or "Transformation Boost" 
Category enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +15%; 
"Majin Buu Saga" Category enemies' and 
allies' ATK & DEF +15%

name: Earth Shrouded in Clouds
description:
"Demonic Power" Category 
enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +15%; 
increases damage received by 
Super Class enemies and allies by 10%, 
plus an additional 15% for characters who 
also belong to the "Earth-Bred Fighters" Category

name: Cell Games Arena
description:
"Tournament Participants" Category 
enemies' and allies' ATK & DEF +15%; 
"Androids" or "Androids/Cell Saga" 
Category enemies' and allies' 
ATK & DEF +15%

name: Earth Shrouded in Minus Energy
description:

also belong to the "Earth-Protecting Heroes",
